name: Lunar Peak Heritage Backpack
description: A durable, water-resistant 25L backpack featuring a padded laptop sleeve and ergonomic shoulder straps for daily commutes.

name: Sonic-X Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear wireless headphones with 40-hour battery life and advanced active noise cancellation technology.

name: Terra Firma Trail Runner
description: High-performance trail running shoes with a deep-lugged outsole for maximum grip on slippery or uneven terrain.

name: Midnight Minimalist Watch
description: A sleek, matte black analog watch with a genuine leather strap and scratch-resistant sapphire crystal.

name: Aura Smart Home Speaker
description: Voice-activated smart speaker with crystal clear highs and deep bass. Integrates with all major smart home ecosystems.

name: Veloce Carbon Fiber Bicycle
description: An ultra-lightweight road bike designed for speed and endurance, featuring a 22-speed drivetrain and hydraulic disc brakes.

name: BrewMaster Precision Kettle
description: Gooseneck electric kettle with temperature control to the degree, perfect for pour-over coffee enthusiasts.

name: EcoSoft Organic Cotton Hoodie
description: Sustainably sourced, heavyweight organic cotton hoodie with a relaxed fit and brushed fleece interior.

name: Zenith 4K Action Camera
description: Capture your adventures in stunning 4K at 60fps. Waterproof up to 30m with the included housing.

name: Nova Glint Desk Lamp
description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with touch controls, wireless phone charging base, and three color temperature modes.
